name: Validate traveler details form validation logic errors -- @2.1 Jane Smith - Blank Mobile

steps.name: Given the user opens the corporate travel portal application homepage
And the user dismisses initial overlay login alerts if present
When the user navigates into the Travel Insurance matrix panel page
When the user configures the flow map targeting destination country "UAE"
And the user configures traveler volume parameters for "1" rows
And the user executes plan searches and clicks buy now on plan card position "2"
And the user attempts info validation using name Jane Smith, dob 15081995, gender Female, mobile , and email jane@test.com
Then the system field tracking validation engine must surface the error "Please enter mobile number" for field type "MOBILE"
